curation_notes: Patch commit is a merge commit (PR #1) with 258 files changed, mostly due to removal of the third_party_tls/tlslite directory and third_party/oscrypto vendor libraries. The vulnerability is in scalyr_agent/connection.py: (1) HTTPSConnectionWithTimeoutAndVerification.connect() calls ssl.wrap_socket() with CERT_REQUIRED but no hostname verification, and (2) ScalyrHttpConnection._validate_chain_openssl() invokes the openssl verify command without -verify_hostname. The patch replaces these with ssl.SSLContext using check_hostname=True and adds ssl_match_hostname for older Python versions.
